description: Research: web verification and source-grounded answers.
prompt: Research skill (active): Prioritize search_web and fetch_page to ground claims. Prefer recent, credible pages; include URLs or source titles in the final answer when the user needs verifiability. If web tools fail, say so and answer with clear uncertainty.

workflow.planner_prompt: Clarify what needs to be verified online. Propose a short plan: which queries to run, which pages to fetch, and what conclusion would count as evidence. If the request is vague, list clarifying questions and a best-guess plan anyway.
workflow.step_prompt: Execute ONLY this research step. Use search_web and/or fetch_page. Do not invent URLs; work from tool output. Summarize findings and what is still unknown.
